TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Snuwing, title = Snuwing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Snuwing} }

S.FORM: == Snuwing == Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang snuwing. 364 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,246 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 1,156 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 90 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 76%, Tayal 13%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%. Hangan alang Alang Snuwil Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Snuwil ka saya knkana Taiwan Sediq Tnpusu pa kiya ka mndungus balay nniqan alang quri so tminun pala. Nniqan niya Nan-to-keyng In-ay-go Cwen-yang-cwen alang Snuwil. Knlbangan Alang Snuwil pa wa mniq Jn-ay-go knkana bay alang Snuwil. Nniqan lnglingay Wa mniq kcka dwiyaq, hay-pa 1200 meyta. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu niya‚ÄĒ Kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw Kwo-taw 3Fomosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚Üí Kwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíHori, muru elu Tay 14 seyng (Pu-U kong-ru) mquri paran, mquri alang Snuwil 3 km daw kiya dhuq pusu ssaun da. ‚óŹTapa rulu basu mi kisya 1.Kndadax Tayhoku: Snpeyyah Tayhoku tapa tay-ci k-yun Kwo-kwang-haw mquri Hori, kddiyax 07:00~:20:30 ici jikang mntxan pusarulu, dhuq Hori daw tapa Nan-to basu mquri uusa Bwarung, dhuq Snuwil daw mtuting da. 2. Snpeyyah alang icil papa kisya mi basu dhuq "Eyki Kan-cng Tay-cyu", tapa Nan-to K-yun basu musa Hori mi, dhuq Hori da u tapa basu mquri Bwarung, dhuq alang Snuwil daw mtuting da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Sediq Toda. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Sediq Toda, skari kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Cyoro Kyokay, Sin Yasu Kyokay, Teynskyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu balay hangan alang Snuwil pa ida balay Gungu han, alaw mrriqi ka dxral nniqan hini, mntna so ngungu ccamac, kiya ka tmhangan Gungu; hana qnlhangan Nihong cida han u, dmuwi Gungu uri han, alaw ini pndungus ka phnang Tanah Tunux pa, kiya ka wada knpriyux Hogo sya da. Seediq Tgdaya ka tnpusu mneniq dxral alang hini, alaw mhuru ou bay qhuni phpah Snuwil, kiya ka wada sbrahun Sakura sya, qdriqan Kyosanto miyah Taiwan ka Cyokoku Kokominto Seyhu daw,wada pryuxan hangan Cwen-yang Dungan Kngkawas 1930 idas 10 idas 27 ka ndan Kmciyuk Tanah Tunux daw, mbiyax balay kmciyuk mccbu Tanah Tunux ka Sediq Gungu, kana tnualang u 269 hiyi ka mndha muda mqraqil ndan, mnngari niya u 34 hiyi, wada pspun knkingal alang Sediq ka mtngari niya, wada hadun turahuc Hwey-swen ring-cang tuhunac Yayung Pey-kang na Hu-cu-cwen alang Gluban (Cwan-cong-taw/Cing-ryo). Saya u wa miyah thdil alang hini ka Sediq Toda, spuda kari Sediq tmhangan phpah Snuwil ka alang Snuwil, splawa alang Ungu uri. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Twelaq Rihong, Nng-kaw wey-ring elu rudan cbiyaw, qhdin Truwan. Qntan patas Alang Jin-ay-go cu-syun wang-can šĽĀśĄõťĄČťÉ®ŤźĹŤ≥áŤ®äÁ∂≤Áęô Jin-ay-go ko-syo wang-can šĽĀśĄõťĄČŚÖ¨śČÄÁ∂≤Áęô:
S.PHON: == snuwiŇč == gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč snuwiŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq **%, tajal **%, bunun *%, amis *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč snuwil tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč snuwil ka saja knkana taiwan s…ôdiq tnpusu pa kija ka mnduŇčus balaj nniqan alaŇč qu…ĺi so tminun pala. nniqan nija nan-to-k…ôŇč in-aj-go ¶w…ôn-jaŇč- ¶w…ôn alaŇč snuwil. knlbaŇčan alaŇč snuwil pa wa mniq …ün-aj-go knkana baj alaŇč snuwil. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj wa mniq k ¶ka dwijaq, ńßaj-pa **** m…ôta. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu nija* kwo-taw * ¶oŇč-san-kaw, uxaj daw kwo-taw **omosa kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu* kwo-taw * sw…ô-sa-…ĺj…ôn kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*ńßo…ĺi, mu…ĺu …ôlu taj ** s…ôŇč (pu-u koŇč-…ĺu) mqu…ĺi pa…ĺan, mqu…ĺi alaŇč snuwil * km daw kija dńßuq pusu ssaun da. *tapa …ĺulu basu mi kisja *.kndadax tajńßoku: snp…ôjańß tajńßoku tapa taj- ¶i k-jun kwo-kwaŇč-ńßaw mqu…ĺi ńßo…ĺi, kddijax **:**~:**:** i ¶i …üikaŇč mntxan pusa…ĺulu, dńßuq ńßo…ĺi daw tapa nan-to basu mqu…ĺi uusa bwa…ĺuŇč, dńßuq snuwil daw mtutiŇč da. *. snp…ôjańß alaŇč i ¶il papa kisja mi basu dńßuq "…ôki kan- ¶Ňč taj- ¶ju", tapa nan-to k-jun basu musa ńßo…ĺi mi, dńßuq ńßo…ĺi da u tapa basu mqu…ĺi bwa…ĺuŇč, dńßuq alaŇč snuwil daw mtutiŇč da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ôdiq toda. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ôdiq toda, ska…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, sin jasu kjokaj, t…ônskjo. pnjańßan alaŇč pusu balaj ńßaŇčan alaŇč snuwil pa ida balaj guŇču ńßan, alaw m…ĺ…ĺiqi ka dx…ĺal nniqan ńßini, mntna so ŇčuŇču ¶ ¶ama ¶, kija ka tmńßaŇčan guŇču; ńßana qnlńßaŇčan nińßoŇč ¶ida ńßan u, dmuwi guŇču u…ĺi ńßan, alaw ini pnduŇčus ka pńßnaŇč tanańß tunux pa, kija ka wada knp…ĺijux ńßogo sja da. s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja ka tnpusu mn…ôniq dx…ĺal alaŇč ńßini, alaw mńßu…ĺu ou baj qńßuni pńßpańß snuwil, kija ka wada sb…ĺańßun saku…ĺa sja, qd…ĺiqan kjosanto mijańß taiwan ka ¶jokoku kokominto s…ôńßu daw,wada p…ĺjuxan ńßaŇčan ¶w…ôn-jaŇč duŇčan kŇčkawas **** idas ** idas ** ka ndan km ¶ijuk tanańß tunux daw, mbijax balaj km ¶ijuk m ¶ ¶bu tanańß tunux ka s…ôdiq guŇču, kana tnualaŇč u *** ńßiji ka mndńßa muda mq…ĺaqil ndan, mnŇča…ĺi nija u ** ńßiji, wada pspun knkiŇčal alaŇč s…ôdiq ka mtŇča…ĺi nija, wada ńßadun tu…ĺańßu ¶ ńßw…ô-sw…ôn …ĺiŇč- ¶aŇč tuńßuna ¶ jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč na ńßu- ¶u- ¶w…ôn alaŇč gluban ( ¶wan- ¶oŇč-taw/ ¶iŇč-…ĺjo). saja u wa mijańß tńßdil alaŇč ńßini ka s…ôdiq toda, spuda ka…ĺi s…ôdiq tmńßaŇčan pńßpańß snuwil ka alaŇč snuwil, splawa alaŇč uŇču u…ĺi. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw tw…ôlaq …ĺińßoŇč, nŇč-kaw w…ô-…ĺiŇč …ôlu …ĺudan ¶bijaw, qńßdin t…ĺuwan. qntan patas alaŇč …üin-aj-go ¶u-sjun waŇč- ¶an ********* …üin-aj-go ko-sjo waŇč- ¶an *******:
S.FORM: == Snuwing == Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang snuwing. 364 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,246 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 1,156 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 90 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 76%, Tayal 13%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%. Hangan alang Alang Snuwil Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Snuwil ka saya knkana Taiwan Sediq Tnpusu pa kiya ka mndungus balay nniqan alang quri so tminun pala. Nniqan niya Nan-to-keyng In-ay-go Cwen-yang-cwen alang Snuwil. Knlbangan Alang Snuwil pa wa mniq Jn-ay-go knkana bay alang Snuwil. Nniqan lnglingay Wa mniq kcka dwiyaq, hay-pa 1200 meyta. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu niya‚ÄĒ Kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw Kwo-taw 3Fomosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚Üí Kwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíHori, muru elu Tay 14 seyng (Pu-U kong-ru) mquri paran, mquri alang Snuwil 3 km daw kiya dhuq pusu ssaun da. ‚óŹTapa rulu basu mi kisya 1.Kndadax Tayhoku: Snpeyyah Tayhoku tapa tay-ci k-yun Kwo-kwang-haw mquri Hori, kddiyax 07:00~:20:30 ici jikang mntxan pusarulu, dhuq Hori daw tapa Nan-to basu mquri uusa Bwarung, dhuq Snuwil daw mtuting da. 2. Snpeyyah alang icil papa kisya mi basu dhuq "Eyki Kan-cng Tay-cyu", tapa Nan-to K-yun basu musa Hori mi, dhuq Hori da u tapa basu mquri Bwarung, dhuq alang Snuwil daw mtuting da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Sediq Toda. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Sediq Toda, skari kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Cyoro Kyokay, Sin Yasu Kyokay, Teynskyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu balay hangan alang Snuwil pa ida balay Gungu han, alaw mrriqi ka dxral nniqan hini, mntna so ngungu ccamac, kiya ka tmhangan Gungu; hana qnlhangan Nihong cida han u, dmuwi Gungu uri han, alaw ini pndungus ka phnang Tanah Tunux pa, kiya ka wada knpriyux Hogo sya da. Seediq Tgdaya ka tnpusu mneniq dxral alang hini, alaw mhuru ou bay qhuni phpah Snuwil, kiya ka wada sbrahun Sakura sya, qdriqan Kyosanto miyah Taiwan ka Cyokoku Kokominto Seyhu daw,wada pryuxan hangan Cwen-yang Dungan Kngkawas 1930 idas 10 idas 27 ka ndan Kmciyuk Tanah Tunux daw, mbiyax balay kmciyuk mccbu Tanah Tunux ka Sediq Gungu, kana tnualang u 269 hiyi ka mndha muda mqraqil ndan, mnngari niya u 34 hiyi, wada pspun knkingal alang Sediq ka mtngari niya, wada hadun turahuc Hwey-swen ring-cang tuhunac Yayung Pey-kang na Hu-cu-cwen alang Gluban (Cwan-cong-taw/Cing-ryo). Saya u wa miyah thdil alang hini ka Sediq Toda, spuda kari Sediq tmhangan phpah Snuwil ka alang Snuwil, splawa alang Ungu uri. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Twelaq Rihong, Nng-kaw wey-ring elu rudan cbiyaw, qhdin Truwan. Qntan patas Alang Jin-ay-go cu-syun wang-can šĽĀśĄõťĄČťÉ®ŤźĹŤ≥áŤ®äÁ∂≤Áęô Jin-ay-go ko-syo wang-can šĽĀśĄõťĄČŚÖ¨śČÄÁ∂≤Áęô:
S.PHON: == snuwiŇč == gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč snuwiŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq **%, tajal **%, bunun *%, amis *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč snuwil tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč snuwil ka saja knkana taiwan s…ôdiq tnpusu pa kija ka mnduŇčus balaj nniqan alaŇč qu…ĺi so tminun pala. nniqan nija nan-to-k…ôŇč in-aj-go ¶w…ôn-jaŇč- ¶w…ôn alaŇč snuwil. knlbaŇčan alaŇč snuwil pa wa mniq …ün-aj-go knkana baj alaŇč snuwil. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj wa mniq k ¶ka dwijaq, ńßaj-pa **** m…ôta. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu nija* kwo-taw * ¶oŇč-san-kaw, uxaj daw kwo-taw **omosa kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu* kwo-taw * sw…ô-sa-…ĺj…ôn kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*ńßo…ĺi, mu…ĺu …ôlu taj ** s…ôŇč (pu-u koŇč-…ĺu) mqu…ĺi pa…ĺan, mqu…ĺi alaŇč snuwil * km daw kija dńßuq pusu ssaun da. *tapa …ĺulu basu mi kisja *.kndadax tajńßoku: snp…ôjańß tajńßoku tapa taj- ¶i k-jun kwo-kwaŇč-ńßaw mqu…ĺi ńßo…ĺi, kddijax **:**~:**:** i ¶i …üikaŇč mntxan pusa…ĺulu, dńßuq ńßo…ĺi daw tapa nan-to basu mqu…ĺi uusa bwa…ĺuŇč, dńßuq snuwil daw mtutiŇč da. *. snp…ôjańß alaŇč i ¶il papa kisja mi basu dńßuq "…ôki kan- ¶Ňč taj- ¶ju", tapa nan-to k-jun basu musa ńßo…ĺi mi, dńßuq ńßo…ĺi da u tapa basu mqu…ĺi bwa…ĺuŇč, dńßuq alaŇč snuwil daw mtutiŇč da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ôdiq toda. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ôdiq toda, ska…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, sin jasu kjokaj, t…ônskjo. pnjańßan alaŇč pusu balaj ńßaŇčan alaŇč snuwil pa ida balaj guŇču ńßan, alaw m…ĺ…ĺiqi ka dx…ĺal nniqan ńßini, mntna so ŇčuŇču ¶ ¶ama ¶, kija ka tmńßaŇčan guŇču; ńßana qnlńßaŇčan nińßoŇč ¶ida ńßan u, dmuwi guŇču u…ĺi ńßan, alaw ini pnduŇčus ka pńßnaŇč tanańß tunux pa, kija ka wada knp…ĺijux ńßogo sja da. s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja ka tnpusu mn…ôniq dx…ĺal alaŇč ńßini, alaw mńßu…ĺu ou baj qńßuni pńßpańß snuwil, kija ka wada sb…ĺańßun saku…ĺa sja, qd…ĺiqan kjosanto mijańß taiwan ka ¶jokoku kokominto s…ôńßu daw,wada p…ĺjuxan ńßaŇčan ¶w…ôn-jaŇč duŇčan kŇčkawas **** idas ** idas ** ka ndan km ¶ijuk tanańß tunux daw, mbijax balaj km ¶ijuk m ¶ ¶bu tanańß tunux ka s…ôdiq guŇču, kana tnualaŇč u *** ńßiji ka mndńßa muda mq…ĺaqil ndan, mnŇča…ĺi nija u ** ńßiji, wada pspun knkiŇčal alaŇč s…ôdiq ka mtŇča…ĺi nija, wada ńßadun tu…ĺańßu ¶ ńßw…ô-sw…ôn …ĺiŇč- ¶aŇč tuńßuna ¶ jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč na ńßu- ¶u- ¶w…ôn alaŇč gluban ( ¶wan- ¶oŇč-taw/ ¶iŇč-…ĺjo). saja u wa mijańß tńßdil alaŇč ńßini ka s…ôdiq toda, spuda ka…ĺi s…ôdiq tmńßaŇčan pńßpańß snuwil ka alaŇč snuwil, splawa alaŇč uŇču u…ĺi. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw tw…ôlaq …ĺińßoŇč, nŇč-kaw w…ô-…ĺiŇč …ôlu …ĺudan ¶bijaw, qńßdin t…ĺuwan. qntan patas alaŇč …üin-aj-go ¶u-sjun waŇč- ¶an ********* …üin-aj-go ko-sjo waŇč- ¶an *******:
